stimulus: While many photographers strive to capture images that look ever more ______blank others look to the past, working with vintage film stocks and antique cameras to produce images with the soft, grainy feel of mid-century photography.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. The convention being tested is the use of a comma to set off an introductory subordinate clause from the main clause. A comma is needed after the introductory clause ("While many...polished") to separate it from the main clause ("others look to the past...").

Choice A is incorrect because adding "but" creates an ungrammatical coordination. Choice B is incorrect because some punctuation is needed between the introductory clause and the main clause. Choice C is incorrect because the introductory clause is a subordinate clause, not a separate independent clause, so a coordinating conjunction isn't needed.
